args.query:
SELECT TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM o.OwnerId)) AS AgentId,
       AVG(CAST(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) - CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM o.ContractID__c)) = TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.Id))
WHERE CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM o.OwnerId)) AS AgentId,
       AVG(CAST(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) - CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM o.ContractID__c)) = TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.Id))
WHERE CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
